title: Add beskid_vscode submodule and Open VSX publish init

source.subject: feat(ci): add beskid_vscode submodule and init for Open VS X publish

body:
## Outcome

Add beskid_vscode submodule and init for Open VS X publish.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`d58dd44`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/d58dd44) — feat(ci): add beskid_vscode submodule and init for Open VS X publish
